bead.title: Review-rejection telemetry: aggregate opus review outcomes per tier
bead.description:
## Scope
Add review-rejection telemetry command that aggregates opus-review outcomes per originating execution tier.

## Context
The post-merge review agent records outcomes in bead events (kind:review). This command aggregates those by the harness/model that produced the original work, showing where the shape gaps are between tiers.

## Files to touch
- cli/cmd/agent_metrics.go — add review-outcomes subcommand
- cli/cmd/agent_metrics_test.go — test with fixture bead events
bead.acceptance: (1) ddx agent metrics review-outcomes aggregates review results (approve, approve_with_edits, reject) from bead events by originating harness/model tier. (2) Output includes: tier, reviews, approvals, rejections, approval_rate. (3) cd cli && go test ./cmd -run TestAgentMetricsReviewOutcomes -count=1 passes. (4) No regressions.
